filter.title: FILTER FLAGGED ITEMS
filter.description: These were flagged by the agent. Decide what belongs in your pipeline.

reasons.job_seeker_desc: Someone looking for work or employment
reasons.collections_desc: Invoice dispute or overdue payment follow-up
reasons.platform_bid_desc: Bid invitation from Procore, BuilderTrend, etc.
reasons.warranty_desc: Past client reporting an issue after completion

consolidate.title: CONSOLIDATE CONTACTS
consolidate.description: These contacts appear to be from the same company.

triage.title: TRIAGE COMPLETED WORK
triage.description: Mark past projects as won or lost. Everything else stays active.

confirmPipeline.title: CONFIRM PIPELINE
confirmPipeline.description: Review your active leads and adjust stages before import.
confirmPipeline.noLeadsDescription: All leads were discarded or marked as won/lost in previous steps.
